_notes: This is a TEST-KIT manifest (scripts/build-desktop-test-kit.sh), not the repo default (desktop/provisioning/manifest.json). The repo is private, so a laptop without access to it cannot have the app fetch the engine tarball from a GitHub release URL the way the real default manifest does -- so this manifest instead ships the engine tarball INSIDE the kit and points 'engine.targets.*.url' at it via file://, resolved to this kit's actual install path by setup-test.sh at run time (the __KIT_DIR__ token above is replaced -- do not hand-edit the rendered manifest.json, it is regenerated on every setup-test.sh run).

embedder + model keep the REAL public URLs/sha256/size copied verbatim from desktop/provisioning/manifest.json -- both are public releases (llama.cpp GitHub, bge-m3-GGUF HuggingFace) and are downloaded for real by the app during provisioning, exercising the exact code path production users will hit.

At public launch, once desktop/provisioning/manifest.json's engine URLs point at a real tagged GitHub release, this whole file:// workaround goes away -- AppConfig.manifest_url: null resolves straight to that repo default and every component downloads over the network. See desktop/TESTING.md.
